historical.title: Demo resolved payment timeout
historical.symptoms: Demo fallback incident returned because ServiceNow is unavailable.
historical.rootCause: A simulated upstream timeout exhausted the connection pool.
historical.resolution: The connection pool was reset and a retry policy was applied.
